description: The Video is a short, 6 second clip of a child making small, high pitch sounds, and then screaming. The viewer then gains an extreme desire to show the video to everyone they can. After only 24 hrs, they burst into laughter and die of asphyxiation. The video does not have an effect on people above age 5
containment: All digital and analog forms of the video are to be removed as soon as possible when the agency is alerted.
